MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Plaintiff's motion for compromise of claim of Minor, B.S.

Dept. 505; Judge Christopher C Hite; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:23 p.m. and concluding at 2:29 p.m.

Plaintifff Eliana Buschman is present represented by Gary LoCruto, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference, placed under oath and testified.
Guardian Ad Litem Ryan Slusser is present represented by Gary LoCruto, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference placed under oath and testified.
Defendant PG&E Corporation not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents brief recitation of case and offer of proof.
Guardian ad Litem is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.
The Court finds the settlement is reasonable and the Guardian ad Litem confirms it is in the best interest of the claimant.

The court hereby APPROVES Plaintiff's Motion for Compromise of Claim for the settlement amount of $4,500.00

Balance of settlement in the sum of $4,500.00 shall be deposited in an account in the minors name at Morgan Stanley, 101 California Street, 23rd floor, San Fracnisco, CA 94111.

The Plaintiff is authorized and directed to execute all documents reasonably necessary to carry out the terms of the settlement.

Proposed Orders Approving Compromise of Claim or Action or Disposition of Proceeds of Judgment for Minor or Person with a Disability and to Deposit Funds in Blocked Account are signed and filed this date.

Court orders matter continued to September 29, 2023, at 1:30 p.m. in Department 505 for progress report on the deposit of funds in a blocked account. (D505)
